name: Nikhil Mhatre
summary: Lead engineer with a focus on building scalable systems that improve performance and reduce complexity. I've led projects that cut costs, sped up development, and made platforms easier to maintain.

highlights: Designed and built an end-to-end auto-detection workflow, from API integration to callback processing and suggestion generation.
Implemented SMS review request click tracking to help businesses identify customers who opened review links.
Worked on tech debt initiatives, including optimizing queries and improving platform performance.

experience.stack: Python/FastAPI, NodeJs/Express, Kafka, MongoDB, PostgreSQL, Redis, GCP, Kubernetes
experience.summary: Lead a team of 10+ engineers in the design and development of the logistics system, cart-promotion system, and content management system.
highlights: Improved logistics cost efficiency of sellers by leading the development of logistics management tools (rule engines for store, delivery partner, and packaging material selection) for an e-commerce platform, empowering effective inventory and delivery management.

Streamlined Delivery Partner (DP) integrations by architecting an ecosystem that used new APIs (focused on Dev-Ex) to enable both the creation and conversion of 8+ DP integrations (microservices), enhancing platform flexibility and reducing development team workload.
Designed a solution to enhance cart module performance by 30% by pre-processing complex promotion rules, streamlining the checkout process and improving overall user satisfaction.

Developed custom attribute system that empowers sellers with finer control over inventory management through dynamic rules. This system enables sellers to store and utilize specialized information beyond standard fields.

experience.stack: Python/Sanic, NodeJs/Express, Kafka, MongoDB, Solr, Redis, AWS, Kubernetes
experience.summary: Managed a cross-functional team of 7+ engineers across 6 e-commerce projects and supporting seamless operation across multiple production environments.
highlights: Significantly improved Kafka consumer reliability by implementing idempotency, resulting in a 20% reduction in message drops.
Led a collaborative project with an external team, managing over 8 developers.
Educated new hires on Fynd's ecosystem and provided mentorship.

experience.stack: Python/Sanic, NodeJs/Express, Kafka, MongoDB, Solr, Redis, AWS, Docker, Kubernetes
highlights: Reduced seller onboarding time from 4 hours to near instantaneous by building and managing core e-commerce distributed systems: catalog and inventory.

Subsequently, developed a discount system to provide sellers with tools to create and manage discounts (e.g., percentage-based, fixed amount discounts), enabling them to attract customers and drive sales.

experience.stack: Python/Django, NodeJs, MongoDB, MariaDB, Redis, React, React Native, Angular, AWS, WebSockets

projects.name: Get-Quote
projects.description: Developed a VS Code extension that displays motivational quotes on startup to enhance developer experience.

projects.name: nsepy
projects.description: Python Library to get publicly available data on NSE website ie. stock quotes, historical data, live indices
